title: rubus × bertolonii
intro: Rubus × bertolonii, a hybrid of the blackberry and raspberry, is a deciduous shrub native to the Mediterranean region. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of anthocyanins and other polyphenolic compounds, which have been shown to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Rubus × bertolonii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. Rubus × bertolonii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and jams, making it a versatile and accessible addition to a healthy diet.
